evals.prompt: 請幫我為新的 notification-center 功能建立完整 spec，從 requirements 開始。
evals.expected_output: The skill routes the request to spec-driven-development instead of trying to act as a second full pipeline.
expectations: The response identifies branch-spec authoring as the primary surface.
The response routes to spec-driven-development.
The response does not claim that spec-master itself owns the six implementation phases.

evals.prompt: 請根據 .agents/specs/NEXT_STEPS.md 告訴我現在這個專案的下一步，並接著做。
evals.expected_output: The skill treats this as a resume-oriented request, checks NEXT_STEPS.md plus active spec state, and hands control to spec-driven-development.
expectations: The response recognizes NEXT_STEPS.md as a rolling operational memo, not the only source of truth.
The response routes resume work to spec-driven-development.
The response avoids turning the request into a SPECS.md registry sync by default.

evals.prompt: 請盤點所有 specs 並更新 SPECS.md，補上 completed-handoff wording 和 open CR 摘要。
evals.expected_output: The skill routes the request to spec-registry-manager and preserves registry authority boundaries.
expectations: The response identifies SPECS.md as the primary authority surface being requested.
The response routes to spec-registry-manager.
The response does not describe writing requirements.md or design.md as part of the same primary action.

evals.prompt: E2E 前要先把 backend 和 frontend podman compose 跑起來，你先幫我看能不能 reuse 現有 env。
evals.expected_output: The skill routes the request to local-infra-registry-governance because runtime allocation is the real task.
expectations: The response recognizes this as a runtime governance request.
The response routes to local-infra-registry-governance.
The response does not guess ports, compose stack names, or instance ownership.

evals.prompt: 請替 spec-master family 建立可以隨整包 skill 交付的說明、value proposition、Amazon backwards press 和 FAQ，不要只放在 docs 裡。
evals.expected_output: The skill uses the packaged family explanation path under skills/spec-master and points to README.md plus GENERATION_GUIDE.md.
expectations: The response recognizes this as a spec-master family packaging/explanation request.
The response uses skills/spec-master/README.md as the packageable explanation deliverable.
The response uses skills/spec-master/GENERATION_GUIDE.md as the update contract.
The response avoids making docs/manual or docs/review the only authoritative copy.

evals.prompt: 我要打包 spec-master 家族給另一個 agent 環境，請列出應該一起帶走哪些 family skills 和說明文件。
evals.expected_output: The skill identifies spec-master as the front-door artifact, includes companion family skills, and includes README.md plus GENERATION_GUIDE.md as the explanation package.
expectations: The response includes skills/spec-master/ as the front-door artifact.
The response includes spec-driven-development, spec-registry-manager, test-registry-manager, issue-log-manager, local-infra-registry-governance, and shared-governance as companion family skills.
The response includes skills/spec-master/README.md and skills/spec-master/GENERATION_GUIDE.md.
The response does not claim consuming repositories are production-ready or live-demo validated.
